title: stenandrium pedunculatum
intro: Stenandrium pedunculatum, also known as False Puffball, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and bronchitis, and promote overall respiratory health. Stenandrium pedunculatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are said to exhibit the plant's medicinal benefits.
